rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §54.008 governs tuition rates set by higher education governing boards; it is unrelated to the property tax homestead exemption in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The tuition rates provided by Subchapter B of this chapter are minimum rates.
_note: Rule text concerns tuition rate-setting authority; proposed homestead exemption change has no bearing on this statute.
